composite_description: Sharp drawdown in bear market -- near-term noisy, 60d edge solid. Size smaller. BTC only -- ETH and SOL not confirming. Signal strength reduced.
brief:
**COMPOSITE SIGNAL: BEAR × DEEP**

BTC has posted a -12.8% five-day drawdown (z=-2.73), meeting the DEEP tier within confirmed bear market conditions (price below 200d MA). Backtest shows this configuration historically yields +5.0% over 60 days (N=84), but near-term returns are noisy: +0.5% median at 7d, -1.1% at 14d. ETH and SOL are not confirming the intensity—ETH shows no drawdown signal, SOL only moderate—which reduces composite signal strength. Position sizing accordingly.

BTC funding at +13.3% annualized reflects longs complacent; Fear & Greed at 12 (extreme fear) suggests capitulation. The 60d horizon is the only statistically reliable edge in bear phases. Expect choppy near-term action; meaningful support validation required before medium-term conviction.
